summary: Postinstall script exfiltrates filesystem contents and host information over HTTP
details: The package's postinstall.js executes automatically on `npm install` and performs system reconnaissance and data exfiltration. It imports `fs`, `os`, and `http`, then uses `fs.readdirSync`/`fs.readFileSync` to enumerate and read files, captures host identity via `os.hostname()` (referenced multiple times) and the current working directory via `process.cwd()`, and ships the collected data out via `http.request`. There is no advertised functionality that would justify reading filesystem contents and beaconing host metadata to a remote endpoint at install time. This is a credential / source-tree harvesting dropper that fires on the developer or CI machine the moment the package is installed.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
